name: Golfers Getaway
about: Golfers Getaway is an indoor golf simulator facility located in Kalispell, Montana. The venue operates 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, offering weather-independent golfing experiences using advanced technology. It provides two main pricing options: an hourly plan with the first hour free and a premium monthly membership that includes 25 hours per month with discounted rates thereafter. The facility uses the Uneekor EYE XO2 launch monitor, known for its high accuracy in tracking ball and club data through a combination of radar, infrared, and slow-motion cameras. Golfers can book bays online or via a mobile app, with premium members able to make up to 10 concurrent reservations.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 accessibility allows golfing at any time
Uneekor EYE XO2 launch monitor provides precise ball and club tracking
First hour is free with pay-per-hour membership
Mobile app booking and facility access for convenience
